text:
Market today: Risk-off hard. U.S. struck Iran, oil spiked, and tech just wrapped one of its worst weeks in a year. AI momentum is cracking — your chip and growth names are the blast radius.

Your holdings: AVGO is the urgent one — down 16% and it's your largest position; on margin that hole is deeper than it looks, and chips are getting hit sector-wide. PLTR is down 13% — growth/AI sentiment is exactly what's rolling over right now. SPAL is down 17% — this is a 2x leveraged, decaying ETF on a brand-new, very volatile IPO (SPCX); it can move violently and margin amplifies every tick against you. All three are on SELL signals. Act or have a clear reason not to.

Watch: (1) How chip names open Monday after the Micron selloff — SMH is your canary. (2) Whether oil keeps rising; sustained energy shock tightens financial conditions and pressures growth stocks harder.

Bottom line: You're margined, concentrated in the exact sector under attack — get your house in order before Monday open.
